seoTitle: Mullalyup vs Mullingar — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mullalyup and Mullingar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mullalyup and Mullingar.
heading: Mullalyup vs Mullingar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mullalyup, Western Australia and Mullingar, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mullingar has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mullalyup (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mullalyup or Mullingar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mullalyup has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Mullingar scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mullalyup scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mullingar scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mullalyup or Mullingar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mullingar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
